title: JayTAK Dupe
description: A simple lightweight item dupe plugin for server admins. Paper 1.20-1.21.1
body:
### JayTAK Dupe
Simple plugin to dupe items.
I needed a plugin for my own server to dupe items as an admin tool, so I wrote one.

For more information, visit my [GitHub](https://github.com/Jaytak/JayTAKDupePlugin)

#### Commands & Aliases
```
/jaytakdupe
/jdupe
/dupe
/jd
```

#### Optional arguments
`+ - / * x X`

##### Example Usage
```
/jd
/jd * 3
/jd + 10
/jd - 20
/jd / 2
/jd x 4
/jd X 4
```

##### Permission Node
`jaytakdupeplugin.dupe`

Grants the player access to the command.

### bStats

![Plugin bStats](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/JayTAK%20Dupe%20Plugin.svg)
